MODULE_UPDATE_NOTIFIER.SettingEnabledHint: When enabled, compares installed module versions against remote manifests on world load and on a timer.
MODULE_UPDATE_NOTIFIER.SettingIntervalHint: How often to re-check manifests while the world is open. Set to 0 to only check when the world loads (and when Check now is used).
MODULE_UPDATE_NOTIFIER.SettingGmOnlyHint: When enabled, only GM clients run checks and receive notifications. When disabled, every connected client checks and may be notified.
MODULE_UPDATE_NOTIFIER.SettingCheckNowHint: Toggle on to run an immediate update check (GM only). Resets automatically.
MODULE_UPDATE_NOTIFIER.Notification: {title}: update available (installed {installed} → remote {remote}). Open Setup → Update Modules to install.
